filesModified.purpose: Added .neon-green gradient override to the generic gradient system

warnings: Asset size limit warnings (340 KiB editor.js)

syncStatus.details: CSS-only change, no TSX/PHP sync required

cssChanges.location: resources/css/screen/colors.css, after :root block and before .blue block
cssChanges.rationale: Completes the generic gradient system by adding the missing .neon-green override. Without this, a .neon-green section on a non-neon-green page would inherit incorrect gradient colors from the page default instead of using neon-green's gradient pair.

testPage.reason: No test page changes needed for this CSS-only revision
